modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with updating EndNote software.

full_description_text: So, the user is trying to update EndNote. They’re not sure how to do it. They just need some guidance on the update process. It seems like they want to make sure everything is up to date.
short_description: Need help with updating EndNote software.
description: So, the user is trying to update EndNote. They’re not sure how to do it. They just need some guidance on the update process. It seems like they want to make sure everything is up to date.
